{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/62582584?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/TREXNEGRO", "id": 62582584, "login": "TREXNEGRO", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYyNTgyNTg0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/TREXNEGRO", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-53927", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:H/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "### Summary
The spreadsheet-fetch endpoint (`axiosRequestMake`) accepted URLs whose path
contained a permitted extension anywhere in the string, and applied a hand-rolled
regex blocklist that omitted `127.0.0.0/8` and `169.254.0.0/16`, allowing the
cloud-metadata endpoint to be reached with a crafted URL.

### Details
The extension matcher is now anchored to the end of the path or immediately before
the query string (`/\.(xls|xlsx|xlsm|ods|ots)(\?|$)/i` and `/\.(csv)(\?|$)/i`), so
`http://169.254.169.254/credentials/.xlsx` no longer satisfies the format gate. The
hand-rolled IP blocklist is removed in favour of `useAgent(url)` from
`request-filtering-agent`, which blocks private and loopback ranges at the socket
layer.

### Impact
Authenticated users with editor permission could read cloud metadata and other
internal HTTP endpoints reachable from the NocoDB process. On affected installs the
spreadsheet import path was a credential-exfiltration primitive on cloud hosts.

### Credit
This issue was reported by Devel Group Security Research Team through [@TREXNEGRO](https://github.com/TREXNEGRO).
It was independently reported by [@l3tchupkt](https://github.com/l3tchupkt).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00282, "percentile": 0.19822}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gprh-27j3-g5h4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-17T14:06:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gprh-27j3-g5h4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gprh-27j3-g5h4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53927"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-17T14:06:43Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-gprh-27j3-g5h4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gprh-27j3-g5h4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-gprh-27j3-g5h4", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Server-Side Request Forgery via Spreadsheet Fetch URL", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-17T14:06:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gprh-27j3-g5h4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.301.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: Server-Side Request Forgery via Spreadsheet Fetch URL
